auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Hookdeck API key sent as a Bearer token. Find it in your Hookdeck project secrets settings.

actions.name: create_connection
actions.description: Create a Hookdeck connection and optionally create or bind its source and destination.

rules.description: Rules to attach to the Hookdeck connection.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a Hookdeck connection.

url.description: The HTTP endpoint URL for an HTTP destination.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a Hookdeck destination.
The input payload for creating a Hookdeck source.

anyOf.description: Whether the Hookdeck source is authenticated.

actions.name: delete_connection
actions.description: Delete a Hookdeck connection by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for selecting a Hookdeck connection.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after deleting a Hookdeck resource.

actions.name: delete_destination
actions.description: Delete a Hookdeck destination by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for selecting a Hookdeck destination.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after deleting a Hookdeck resource.

actions.name: delete_source
actions.description: Delete a Hookdeck source by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for selecting a Hookdeck source.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after deleting a Hookdeck resource.

actions.name: get_connection
actions.description: Get one Hookdeck connection by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for selecting a Hookdeck connection.

actions.name: get_destination
actions.description: Get one Hookdeck destination by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for selecting a Hookdeck destination.

actions.name: get_source
actions.description: Get one Hookdeck source by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for selecting a Hookdeck source.

anyOf.description: Whether the Hookdeck source is authenticated.

actions.name: list_connections
actions.description: List Hookdeck connections with optional filters and cursor pagination.

name.description: Filter connections by name or name expression.

fullName.description: Fuzzy match the Hookdeck full_name value.

limit.description: The maximum number of connections to return. Hookdeck allows up to 250.

next.description: The Hookdeck cursor for the next page.

prev.description: The Hookdeck cursor for the previous page.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Hookdeck connections.

connections.description: The Hookdeck connections returned by the API.

count.description: The number of connections returned by Hookdeck.

order_by.description: The field Hookdeck used for ordering this page.

dir.description: The ordering direction returned by Hookdeck.

limit.description: The page size returned by Hookdeck.

next.description: The cursor for the next page when present.

prev.description: The cursor for the previous page when present.

actions.name: list_destinations
actions.description: List Hookdeck destinations with optional filters and cursor pagination.

name.description: Filter resources by name or name expression.

limit.description: The maximum number of resources to return. Hookdeck allows up to 250.

next.description: The Hookdeck cursor for the next page.

prev.description: The Hookdeck cursor for the previous page.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Hookdeck resources.

destinations.description: The Hookdeck destinations returned by the API.

count.description: The number of destinations returned by Hookdeck.

order_by.description: The field Hookdeck used for ordering this page.

dir.description: The ordering direction returned by Hookdeck.

limit.description: The page size returned by Hookdeck.

next.description: The cursor for the next page when present.

prev.description: The cursor for the previous page when present.

actions.name: list_sources
actions.description: List Hookdeck sources with optional filters and cursor pagination.

name.description: Filter resources by name or name expression.

limit.description: The maximum number of resources to return. Hookdeck allows up to 250.

next.description: The Hookdeck cursor for the next page.

prev.description: The Hookdeck cursor for the previous page.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Hookdeck resources.

anyOf.description: Whether the Hookdeck source is authenticated.

sources.description: The Hookdeck sources returned by the API.

count.description: The number of sources returned by Hookdeck.

order_by.description: The field Hookdeck used for ordering this page.

dir.description: The ordering direction returned by Hookdeck.

limit.description: The page size returned by Hookdeck.

next.description: The cursor for the next page when present.

prev.description: The cursor for the previous page when present.

actions.description: Update a Hookdeck connection by ID.

rules.description: Rules to attach to the Hookdeck connection.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating a Hookdeck connection.

actions.name: update_destination
actions.description: Update a Hookdeck destination by ID.

url.description: The HTTP endpoint URL for an HTTP destination.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating a Hookdeck destination.

actions.name: update_source
actions.description: Update a Hookdeck source by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating a Hookdeck source.

anyOf.description: Whether the Hookdeck source is authenticated.
